name: Senmiao Technology Ltd
summary: PARTI Overview Senmiao is not a Chinese operating company but a U.S. holding company incorporated in the State of Nevada on June8, 2017. As a holding company with no material operations of its own, Senmiao conducts a substantial majority of its operations through its Operating Entities established in the PRC, including its subsidiaries and the equity investee company.
